title: draba nivicola var. orbiculata
intro: Draba nivicola var. orbiculata, also known as a type of alpine cress or snow cress, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Draba nivicola var. orbiculata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
